allow: Bash(else echo "types directory does not exist")
Bash(npx shadcn@latest add button card dialog input label select textarea badge table tabs toast dropdown-menu sheet separator avatar skeleton alert form popover --yes)
Bash(npx shadcn@latest add button card dialog input label select textarea badge table tabs sonner dropdown-menu sheet separator avatar skeleton alert form popover --yes)
Bash(npx shadcn@latest add button card dialog input label select textarea badge table tabs sonner dropdown-menu sheet separator avatar skeleton alert form popover --yes --overwrite)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: major platform overhaul - inclusive messaging, shadcn/ui, billing, and architecture improvements

- Update homepage messaging to target both social events \(weddings, graduations\) and business events \(conferences, exhibitions\)
- Add social event types \(wedding, graduation, social\) to event creation flow with pink-themed icons
- Replace business-only hero text with inclusive "أدر فعالياتك باحترافية"
- Update feature slider, marquee, FAQ, blog posts, and footer to include social events
- Fix Navbar and StickyCTA links to route to /login instead of /dashboard for unauthenticated users
- Replace Briefcase logo icon with Sparkles for brand-neutral identity
- Add shadcn/ui design system with full component library
- Implement billing system with Polar.sh integration and hybrid pricing \(subscriptions + per-event + add-ons\)
- Fix SubscriptionTracker to use profiles table instead of deprecated subscriptions table
- Fix dashboard to show dynamic plan from user profile instead of hardcoded free plan
- Add redirect to /login when unauthenticated user accesses dashboard
- Fix yearly pricing display \(790/1,990 SAR\) to match plans.ts
- Move serverComponentsExternalPackages to serverExternalPackages \(Next.js 15.5 deprecation\)
- Add surveys, analytics, wallet passes, push notifications, PDF certificates, Excel export
- Add about, contact, blog, privacy, terms pages
- Implement React Hook Form + Zod validation across all forms
- Replace SWR with TanStack Query for data fetching
- Clean up 20+ root documentation files moved to docs/
- Remove deprecated files and consolidate utilities
- Add CI workflow, Sentry error tracking, PWA with offline support

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
